sources.title: Ghost Webcam | 2024 New Horror Thriller Movie | Horror Free Movie
sources.description:
Ghost Webcam | 2024 New Horror Thriller Movie | Horror Free Movie - Ghost Webcam follows in real time NATE, a 23-year-old African American under house arrest goes on a virtual date with MIA. Mia leads him onto ghostwebcam.com and she gets killed online. NATE wants to find out if this is real or a hoax but is stuck at home and at risk of immediate arrest if he goes anywhere, he wrangles his friends online to unravel the mystery of the ghost webcam.
2024. Stars: Kahlo De Jesus Buffington, Nicholas Thurkettle, Trinity Alyse
